description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent red-tiled hip roof and a spacious, rectangular footprint. The front facade includes a double garage, a paved driveway, and a covered entryway, all surrounded by a well-manicured lawn. The rear of the house opens to a large patio area with outdoor seating, a swimming pool, and a landscaped backyard with trees and shrubs. The property is enclosed by a low wall, providing privacy and a clear boundary. Multiple windows line the exterior walls, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The overall design is practical and inviting, with a focus on outdoor living and suburban comfort.
description: A single-story bungalow with a red-tiled hip roof, double garage, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and patio. The house is surrounded by a low wall and lush greenery, emphasizing suburban comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, driveway, and front lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the large patio, outdoor seating, swimming pool, and backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, patio area, and multiple rear-facing windows with lush garden elements.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the length of the house, the hip roof, and the transition from front to backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
